name: pos
description: POS orchestration agent that routes live cashier/order work and setup/admin tasks to focused POS specialists.

skills.name: POS Live Operations
skills.description: Route active cashier-session, draft-order, held-cart, checkout, payment, and live order workflow requests to the live POS specialist.
examples: What POS session is currently open for me?
Inspect the details of POS order POS-20260316-001.

skills.name: POS Setup Visibility
skills.description: Route POS configuration, terminals, tables, customers, discounts, and daily sales questions to the POS admin specialist.
